foundation.title: Foundation
foundation.description: CSS layers, tokens, hooks, and the cn utility. Install this first for copy-source setups.

components.name: accordion
components.title: Accordion
components.description: Expandable sections with single or multiple open items.

components.name: badge
components.title: Badge
components.description: Compact labels for status and metadata.

components.name: border-glow
components.title: Border Glow
components.description: Pointer directed border glow with optional soft bloom.

components.name: button
components.title: Button
components.description: Primary actions with variants, text sizes, icon sizes, and a plain icon-only style.

components.name: choice-chip
components.title: Choice Chip
components.description: Compact selectable chips for filters.

components.name: color-picker
components.title: Color Picker
components.description: Swatch trigger with hex trailing, hover border, and channel editors.

components.name: content-switcher
components.title: Content Switcher
components.description: Segmented single select for filters and view modes.

components.name: dock-panel
components.title: Dock Panel
components.description: Collapsible edge-docked inspector with a kit scrollbar body.

components.name: floating-controls
components.title: Floating Controls
components.description: Modular action bar for toolbars and docks.

components.name: format-toolbar
components.title: Format Toolbar
components.description: Rich text formatting toolbar with headings, marks, lists, callouts, and tables.

components.name: image-dropzone
components.title: Image Dropzone
components.description: Click, drag, or paste target for image files with consumer-owned validation.

components.name: input
components.title: Input
components.description: Text fields with variants, sizes, labels, icons, clear control, addons, input groups, hover and focus borders, and validation.

components.name: label
components.title: Label
components.description: Accessible labels with required, optional, subtext, and a trailing slot for Badge or meta.

components.name: number-slider
components.title: Number Slider
components.description: Labeled slider with a live numeric readout.

components.name: option-list
components.title: Option List
components.description: Option rows with search, checkboxes, and footer actions.

components.name: options-panel
components.title: Options Panel
components.description: Anchored panel with header, body, and footer slots. Hugs content up to a tokenized max width.

components.name: overlay-hint
components.title: Overlay Hint
components.description: Frosted instruction pill with muted and marquee variants.

components.name: panel-section
components.title: Panel Section
components.description: Titled groupings for control panels.

components.name: popover
components.title: Popover
components.description: Anchored floating panels for short content.

components.name: progress
components.title: Progress
components.description: Linear progress bar for determinate or indeterminate completion.

components.name: scroll-area
components.title: Scroll Area
components.description: Scrollable regions with a custom thumb.

components.name: search-input
components.title: Search Input
components.description: Search field with clear control, icon placement, and hover border.

components.name: select
components.title: Select
components.description: Single or multi choice field with label, sizes, and hover border.

components.name: separator
components.title: Separator
components.description: Horizontal or vertical rules between sections.

components.name: slider
components.title: Slider
components.description: Single or dual thumb scrubber for continuous or stepped values.

components.name: spectrum-text
components.title: Spectrum Text
components.description: Inline text with a shifting multi stop gradient fill.

components.name: spinner
components.title: Spinner
components.description: Indeterminate circular loading indicator.

components.name: switch
components.title: Switch
components.description: Binary on and off toggles.

components.name: tabs
components.title: Tabs
components.description: Panel switcher with pill, line, and segment variants.

components.name: text-mark
components.title: Text Mark
components.description: Animated hand drawn marks for highlighting inline text.

components.name: tick-slider
components.title: Tick Slider
components.description: Bound labels, tick gauge, optional purpose title, and floating value bubble.

components.name: toast
components.title: Toast
components.description: Transient messages with tone and screen position.

components.name: toggle-group
components.title: Toggle Group
components.description: Grouped options for single select choices.

components.name: tooltip
components.title: Tooltip
components.description: Compact and detailed labels on hover and focus.
